---
name: Feature Request
about: Share an idea or enhancement for BrainBytes
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Description
Is your feature request related to an existing issue or limitation? Describe the problem clearly and explain why it needs improvement.
*Example: "I find it difficult to..."*

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to see implemented. Explain how you expect it to work.

## Alternative Approaches
List any other solutions, workarounds, or feature ideas you have considered.

## Relevance to BrainBytes
Explain how this enhancement would improve the BrainBytes AI tutoring platform and benefit its users.

## Additional Details
Provide any extra information that may be helpful, such as screenshots, mockups, examples, or other supporting materials.
